title: Jira: AI work item creation from Microsoft Teams is now generally available
description: We’re excited to announce the general availability of AI-powered work item creation from Microsoft Teams chat. You can now use AI to create Jira work items directly from Microsoft Teams chats. AI analyzes your chat context to quickly generate work item details, saving you time. The content is automatically localized to the language set in your MS Teams settings, ensuring clarity and relevance. Additionally, the AI-generated descriptions follow a pre-defined structure based on the work type, main
